creator: devon.odell@coyotepoint.com
text:
I approve of this patch, but the patches at:

http://www.raqdevil.com/pipermail/raqdevil-current/2007-April/000107.html

Need to be applied after this one to unbreak this port. I don't know if 
miwi@ wants to take care of this (we've been in touch about this port) 
or if the submitter would like to fix the patch, but if all is done, I 
approve.

--dho
